faq.q: How many GCC centers does Advance Auto Parts operate in India?
faq.a: Advance Auto Parts operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.a: Advance Auto Parts's India GCC presence is in Hyderabad.

faq.a: Advance Auto Parts runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Advance Auto Parts's India GCCs?
faq.a: Advance Auto Parts's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Advance Auto Parts's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 10 leaders at Advance Auto Parts's India centers, across IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
